notes: Default gravity deck for Elicia's booth. Cards are textures the room takes on across a single session — the modem rack hums two floors down, the cicadas pause, a tape skips on a wall it isn't supposed to be on. Endgame cards carry heavier consequences and ride at the bottom of the pile.

deck.title: the cicadas pause
deck.flavor: outside, the cicadas all stop at once. fifteen seconds of the night being what it claims to be. then it isn't.

deck.title: tape drift
deck.flavor: the master reel speeds up by a hair. nobody can hear it but you and the take counter.

deck.title: a visitor lingers in the lounge
deck.flavor: they're finishing a magazine from six months ago. they will not be rushed. they are reading a piece about a band that broke up while they were reading the article.

deck.title: the cathedral calls
deck.flavor: frasier knocks on the back door. he doesn't come in. he leaves a small balsa-wood object on the welcome mat that says LISTEN.

deck.title: wrong take
deck.flavor: the take had a buzz on the high end. you didn't catch it. you'll catch it on playback in seventeen minutes.

deck.title: the returner speaks
deck.flavor: the returner says something true while you were turned around to thread the new reel. you missed the first half. you will hear the back half. the back half will not be enough.

deck.title: patch short
deck.flavor: a cable in the patch bay shorts. the booth and the lounge bleed into each other for two minutes. somebody in the booth hears somebody in the lounge laugh.

deck.title: outside, a voice
deck.flavor: somebody yelling something half a block away that you almost catch. somebody else answering them. neither voice was supposed to be there at this hour.

deck.title: the kettle boils through
deck.flavor: the kitchenette's kettle has gone past third gear. the room smells of warmth and copper. somebody in the lounge stands up to pour.

deck.title: an old tape skips
deck.flavor: a tape in the library skips on its own. you can hear it from the console. it skips on a word that you remember was the word a different visitor used three years ago.

deck.title: the phone rings through
deck.flavor: the unplugged landline rings anyway. you don't pick it up. it stops after seven rings. mackenzie's pattern.

deck.title: the bus outside
deck.flavor: cora's bus passes the booth on its way back to the depot. the headlight sweep moves across the booth window. nobody on the bus tonight you'd recognise. the headlight is enough.

deck.title: reel overrun
deck.flavor: the reel is filling faster than tonight is finishing. the leader-tape is in sight. you can see the cardboard core through the diminishing wind.

deck.title: the truth arrives
deck.flavor: somebody unscheduled is in the entry hall. they have come to say one thing and leave. you can hear them breathing on the welcome mat. you have not yet opened the inner door.

deck.title: the long quiet falls
deck.flavor: the room is suddenly quieter than it has any right to be. nobody coughs. nobody shifts in the lounge couch. the kettle doesn't click. the reel turns and the reel does not catch on anything.

deck.title: the cicadas resume
deck.flavor: the cicadas come back louder than before. the night announces it knows what's happening in the booth tonight. it does not approve. it does not disapprove. it announces, and goes back to what it was doing.
